speaker: ANTONY
text: Their preparation is today by sea;

speaker: ANTONY
text: We please them not by land.

speaker: ANTONY
text: I would they’d fight i’ th’ fire or i’ th’ air;

speaker: ANTONY
text: We’d fight there too. But this it is: our foot

speaker: ANTONY
text: Upon the hills adjoining to the city

speaker: ANTONY
text: Shall stay with us—order for sea is given;

speaker: ANTONY
text: They have put forth the haven—

speaker: ANTONY
text: Where their appointment we may best discover
